---
layout: cv
title: Reiden Johnson's CV
---
# Reiden Johnson
Computer Information Technology | Cybersecurity

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="reidenjohnson@gmail.com">reidenjohnson@gmail.com</a>
| <a href="http://linkedin.com/in/reidenjohnson">My Linkedin page</a>
| <a href="https://reidenjohnson.github.io/datascience_portfolio/gh-pages/resume.pdf">Download PDF</a>

<!-- || <a href="https://github.com/byuidatascience/datascience_portfolio/blob/gh-pages/resume.pdf">Download PDF</a>
-->
</div>


## Currently

Senior at BYU-Idaho focused on cybersecurity, data analysis, and applied systems


### Specialized in

Python, SQL, data analysis, cybersecurity fundamentals, Linux systems, REST APIs

### Research interests

Languages, Cloud Systems, automation, efficiency, problem solving


## Education

`2020 - 2026`
__Brigham Young University - Idaho__

- B.S. Computer Information Technology
- Minor in Russian




<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: May 2013 -->
